computeIntervals()
Compute Activity Intervals for Multiple Data Frames
computeInvalids()
Title
connectInterval()
Connect Clustered Time Intervals
connectOverDistance()
Connect intervals that are close enough Generates a smaller dataframe of connected intervals using a data frame of given intervals and a distance that allows tow of them to be connected
connectOverDistanceV2()
Connect intervals that are close enough Generates a smaller dataframe of connected intervals using a data frame of given intervals and a distance that allows tow of them to be connected
connectOverInterval()
Connect intervals of a first dataframe using a second dataframe of intervals
correctForDST()
Correct Timestamps for Daylight Saving Time (DST) Transitions
criteriaGenerator()
Helps create functions for evaluating boolean expressions over a data frame that are going to be used as criteria for searching bouts.
criterio2Interval()
Convert a data frame with a column called .criterio to a data frame of intervals of bouts of that criteria
criterioBout()
Indicates which rows meets the criteria for be considered part of a Bout meeting certain criteria
criterioENMO()
Indicates which rows meets certain limits for ENMO
criterioSIB()
Indicates which rows meets the criteria for be considered part of a SIB (Sustained Inactivity Bouts)
dataframe2Interval()
Title
dygraphTS()
Title
getInfoOfFiles()
Retrieve Information of Files in a Directory
getSummary()
Create a summery for the column .criterio of a data frame representing accelerometer data
girafePlot()
Title
intersectIntervals()
Intersect Interval Vectors or Lists
interval2Color()
Title
interval2criterio()
Evaluate Timeline Against Intervals
interval2Dataframe()
Convert an interval to a dataframe
intervalBiggerOfDay()
Obtain the intervals formed by the best candidates every day to be considered as time and sleeping in bed
intervalColor2checkbox()
Title
intervalIntersectv2()
Intersect the intervals given by two dataframes Generates the intersection dataframe resulting from the intersection of the intervals represented by two dataframes of intervals
intervalMelt()
Melt intervals of a first dataframe using a second dataframe of intervals
intervalQuantile2()
Title
intervalReposo()
Obtain the intervals formed by the best candidates every day to be considered as time and sleeping in bed
intervalSimplify()
Simplify intervals of a first dataframe using a second dataframe of intervals
intervalsQuantiles()
Calculate Temporal Quantiles of Intervals
interval_FromTo()
Title
isOn()
summarises time of Non Wear. Criteria: GGIR. Viene de los epochs, creado en fase 1. FALTA describir.

searchByCriteria()
Search Bouts by Dynamic Criteria
searchMaxActivity()
Title searchMaxActivity busca dentro de un intervalo de medida el tramo en que ocurre la mayor cantidad de cierta variable de interes
SIB()
Summarises Sustained Inactivity Bouts (SIB) according to the criteria by Vincent van Hees Critera: Identify 5-min-bouts with < 5 degrees change in angle.
SIB_v2()
Evaluate SIB (Sustained Inactivity Bouts) v2
touchedIntervals()
Find Touched Intervals
verificar_cambio_horario()
Title
wear()
summarises wear time. Criteria: GGIR. Viene de los epochs, creado en fase 1. FALTA describirlo.
